text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature has received a fan letter and one
thousand origami cranes, which I give to her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I mean, seriously, this fan made a thousand
origami cranes for a side character like me...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
One thousand. Can you imagine how long it
must've taken?
choice_data_list:
That's just how dedicated they are to
supporting you.

That's just how dedicated they are to
supporting you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I know. And it's not like I don't appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, I guess it's time to head to training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She carefully arranges the origami cranes on the
window and we head off to training.
